SUMMARY: The real plan, hashes, caps, determinism, teacher identity, caveat, bars, licensing record, and decode honesty check out. Rejection is required because three explicit hard rules are not structurally enforced.

evidence: All three compare-only media SHAs were accepted when paired with permitted pb.vision ID 0tmdeghtfvjx.
Percent-encoded aliases bypassed all four protected clip names, all three compare-only IDs, and IYnbdRs1Jdk.
The loader trusts an ignored pb.vision manifest's ID-to-SHA association.
Same media/frame content under different sample IDs passed assert_no_pseudo_in_validation.
_validation_rows rewrote injected teacher_derived=true, ground_truth=false provenance into teacher_derived=false, ground_truth=true and roboflow_human_annotation.
The future GPU materialization barrier is prose metadata, not an executable final-list validator.

evidence.problem: These exactly match the live P1 directory, but P1 dataset_manifest.json and train_family_balanced.txt are ignored/untracked. No committed authoritative manifest pins these six values, and load_closed_p1 accepts and newly fingerprints any structurally similar replacement.

CRITERIA.result: 7,200 unique candidates, 18 source families, exactly 400/source; maximum venue family is Rich Pickleball at 800/7,200 = 11.111%, below 15%.

YOLO26m person class 0, confidence 0.60, Ultralytics default NMS, checkpoint SHA 401cea9ab23ad19246ff7744859816bc599f350e93c9dd30367b6f0a0745d0b7 matching committed models/MANIFEST.json. Protocol overrides mark the pack non-production.
No-write regeneration produced all 13 outputs byte-identical to the existing pack. All 12 artifact-index hashes and sizes matched.
The manifest contains verbatim: teacher misses become background holes in pseudo frames. Aggregate F1 and mAP50 deltas must both be positive, with both metrics non-negative for each held-out family.

All 7,200 rows are explicitly GPU-required candidates with teacher_conf=null. pseudo_train.txt, mixed_train.txt, and data.yaml are absent. report.json correctly calls the objective PARTIAL and does not claim materialized labels.
All eight harvest rows record license_field=null, owner_directed_experiment_only_source_license_unresolved, production_eligible=false, and exclusion from validation/evaluation/promotion.

ADDITIONAL_FINDING.finding: The allocator initially caps source_family_id and later trims shared venue families without redistribution. A feasible 6,000-row override case returns 5,880. The frozen real 7,200-row plan is unaffected.

REPORT_CORRECTION: report.json overclaims that quarantine exclusions fail closed and that pseudo-validation isolation is structural. The current artifacts are segregated, but the negative-input guarantees are false.

TEST_EVIDENCE.fresh_negative_probes: Compare-SHA aliases, encoded aliases, renamed-content validation, and provenance-rewrite probes failed the claimed guarantees.

pre_dispatch_fixes: Freeze permitted pb.vision ID-to-SHA pairs and deny all three compare-only SHAs.
Canonicalize identity and lineage using bounded repeated URL decoding plus Unicode normalization.
Content-collision-check decoded candidates against the four protected clips and three compare-only videos.
Commit an authoritative closed-P1 closure-hash manifest and fail closed against all six fidelity hashes.
Implement an executable materializer/final validator that derives validation only from the pinned P1 artifacts and rejects overlap by content hash, media lineage, and source family.
on_vm_preconditions_after_re_review: Verify the reviewed pack, decode-plan and interleave SHAs before execution.
SHA-verify all 18 source videos; resolve paths, reject unsafe symlinks, and confirm every frozen frame index exists against actual decode counts and PTS.
Freeze and record Ultralytics, CUDA, decoder, image-size, seed and resolved NMS configuration.
Run person class 0 only at confidence >=0.60, with no geometric post-filter or four-player cap.
Do not reuse run_yolo26_teacher.py unchanged; its confidence 0.18, IoU 0.6, extra classes, geometry filters and player cap conflict with this protocol.
Record confidence per retained detection and an explicit zero-detection state for candidate frames.
Materialize exactly 7,200 candidate frames and the frozen 14,400-entry 1:1 interleave; generate a VM-local data.yaml only after all checks pass.
Recompute the six P1 hashes and rerun content/lineage-based pseudo-versus-validation isolation on final files.
Preregister identical control/candidate initialization, image size, epochs, optimizer, augmentations, seeds, exposure budget and scorer.
Require positive aggregate F1 and mAP50 deltas and non-negative deltas for both metrics on each held-out family.
Retain VERIFIED=0, do_not_promote and experiment-only licensing posture regardless of outcome.
